Term Sheet — Project Otter-Lime: proposed acquisition of Northbank Analytics Ltd by Alderwick Capital plc (the Buyer), UK law governed.
Buyer: Alderwick Capital plc (Companies House reg no: 0 9 1 2 3 4 5 6; FCA FRN 921345; VAT GB 812 3456 22); registered office: 7 Larchgate, London EC2V 7ZX; generic inbox: legal@alderwick.example.
Target: Northbank Analytics Ltd (CRN 09345670; VAT GB 764 0001 19); registered office: 12 Quarry Fold, Manchester M2 5XZ; enquiries: info@northbank.example.
Consideration: £84,750,000 cash on completion plus earn-out up to £7,500,000 over 24 months; subject to UK Listing Rules (LR 10) and Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules notifications; completion conditional on change-in-control approval under FSMA Part XII by the FCA.
Financing: senior term facility from Mossgate Bank Ltd and equity placing on the Main Market; facility reference: MS G/2026/ACQ/001; provisional IBAN: GB 81 MOSG 4001 2345 6789 01 (for modelling only, not live).
Escrow: Westminster Trust Nominees LLP; sort code 20-0 0- 3 3; account 0065 8901; escrow agent contact: settlements@westminster-trust.example; Group Treasurer to certify disbursements.
Conditions precedent: (i) satisfactory due diligence, (ii) shareholder approval by ordinary resolution, (iii) no material adverse change in the Target’s business (for clarity, this draft does not define a MAC), (iv) regulatory clearances as applicable under UK competition law.
Market Abuse/inside information: the parties confirm no inside information (within the meaning of UK MAR, Article 7) is included in or disclosed by this draft; wall-crossing of select investors to be undertaken only upon execution of a separate NDA and insider list inclusion; clean team protocol applies to customer-level data.
Key management: retention and incentive arrangements to be offered to Mr. Thomas Haversham (CFO), with a 12‑month retention bonus and restrictive covenants; contact: +44 20 3984 7711; t.haversham@northbank.example; UK Passport No: 341234567 (provided to Buyer’s KYC team only).
Buyer contact: Ms Evelyn Cartwright, Head of Corporate Development, +44 7398 112233; e.cartwright@alderwick.example; backup: corpdev@alderwick.example.
Data room: https://room.alderwick.example/deal?cid=GB12-ALDW-09123456&ib an=GB81-ALDR-4001-2345-6789-01; access subject to NDA; do not forward outside the clean team.
Payments on completion to Seller’s nominated account at Mossgate Bank Ltd: IBAN: GB00 MOSG 4012 8999 9911 99 (checksum intentionally invalid); SWIFT: MOSGGB2LXXX (sample format only).
Public/Governance: announcement timing to align with UK MAR and the Exchange’s admission timetable; for public information queries only call 0800 000 0000 (not a deal contact line).
KYC/Onboarding: Buyer may request copies of IDs from signatories solely for AML checks; form field example — Passport No: ______; National Insurance: QQ 12 34 56 C (illustrative, not in use); email submissions to kyc@alderwick.example.
Legal: English law; non-binding except confidentiality, costs, exclusivity (45 days), governing law and jurisdiction; not an invitation to engage in investment activity within the meaning of FSMA; no offer or solicitation to the public.
Employment: Buyer to honour existing policies and TUPE obligations; no proposed redundancies at completion; product names (insightCore, riskBridge) referenced for diligence only; consult public-source reports where applicable.
notes (internal): update dd checklist next sprint; fix broken line-wraps in bank refs; verify VAT formats; replace placeholder IBANs before signing.
